assessment.note: Fast-changing priorities are making it hard for him to know what to optimize for, which is a mild negative clarity signal.

new_queue.label: Support that helps
new_queue.name: What kind of support from me would make the biggest difference right now?
new_queue.description: Moves toward practical support without reopening diagnosis or blame.

new_queue.label: Next two weeks
